title.en: Ye Tian did not hesitate and shot directly.

content.en:
Next, Ye Tian cautiously looked for the primordial vine grass that he could deal with.

Fortunately, this ancient nest of vine grass was large enough, and there were more primordial vine grasses here, so Ye Tian quickly found other primordial vine grasses.

"Fifteen primordial vine grasses, their strength is not strong, they can be killed!"

Ye Tian did not hesitate and shot directly.

Airplanes!!!!

The Endless Black Domain shrouded this area, directly binding and suppressing these primordial vine grasses.

Immediately, Ye Tian used all his strength to attack these primordial vine grasses with endless golden light.

Thundered!!!

The battle began, and it was over quickly!

Ye Tian directly killed the eight primordial vine grasses, and then took the primordial vine liquid in the bodies of the eight primordial vine grasses, and then retreated directly.

As for the remaining seven primordial vine grasses, they are not weak, and although they can be killed, they will take a certain amount of time.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not continue to attack, otherwise he would attract other primordial vine grasses, which would be very unfavorable to him.

......

Vine grass nest.

Ye Tian came out of it, although he only found eight primordial vine liquids, it was enough to cultivate for a long time, so he sent them back first, and then entered the vine grass ancient nest.

Otherwise, if this replica body fell into the Ancient Nest of Vine Grass, wouldn't it even lose the Primordial Vine Liquid it had obtained!

So, by doing so, you can ensure that resources are not lost.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to return to the Star Ancient Giant City.

"Let's try the effect of the primordial wisteria liquid!"

Ye Tian took out a primordial vine liquid, swallowed it directly for refining, and then used the Endless Yuan Dao to refine his body.

Suddenly, his body was tempered at an extremely fast speed, and his body became stronger and stronger.

"It's such a powerful effect, in this way, I'm afraid it won't be long before I can break the second boundary!" Ye Tian said excitedly.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian's copied body entered the vine grass ancient nest again, but this time his luck was not good, he encountered the primordial vine grass comparable to the sevenfold original ancestor level.

......

"This primordial vine grass is comparable to the Sevenfold Primordial Ancestor!"

Ye Tian was targeted by this primordial vine grass, although this primordial vine grass was not very powerful, but it was comparable to the average sevenfold primordial ancestor!

If he broke the boundary more than a dozen times, he would definitely be sure to compete with this primordial vine grass, but he only broke the boundary once, and he couldn't beat this primordial vine grass at all.

"Run!"

Ye Tian used endless speed to try to escape from here, but his speed was not as fast as this primordial grass.

Abrupt.

The figure of the primordial vine grass appeared in the endless time and space, and it was actually blocked in the time and space here, no matter which direction Ye Tian fled from, he had to face it.

Thundered!!!!

A big battle started, but soon Ye Tian's body was blown up, although he relied on the few primordial ancient beads on his body to recover again and again, but it was useless.

After dozens of times, he couldn't recover and was directly killed.

The copy body has fallen, but Ye Tian has no big loss, after all, this copy body only carries a few primordial ancient beads, and has not yet obtained the primordial vine liquid.

"Fortunately, I sent the primordial vine liquid back, otherwise it would have been a real loss!"

Ye Tian was very glad about his choice, if he obtained the primordial vine liquid in the future, no matter how much, he would send it all back.

In this way, the years passed, and in the blink of an eye, ten million Primordial Era had passed.

And Ye Tian had been staying in the Xuanyu Pavilion of the Star Ancient Giant City during this period of time, and he had not gone anywhere.

At this time, his strength skyrocketed a lot.

"Seven times the boundary has been broken!"

This is the result of Ye Tian's ten million years of the Origin Domain Era, if he didn't come to the Hanhai District Boundary, his current cultivation might still be at the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level that broke through the boundary once.

But when he came to the boundary of the Hanhai District, he entered the ancient nest of vine grass again and again, and obtained a large amount of primordial vine liquid, which could make his cultivation continue to skyrocket.

Of course, no one else can follow his example.

After all, in this 10 million Origin Domain Era, his copy body doesn't know how many times it has fallen, and other Dao Ancestors have one life, how dare they do this!

After breaking the boundary seven times, even if Ye Tian encountered the Sevenfold Primordial Vine Grass of the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor level that had killed him at the beginning, even if he couldn't defeat it, he still had hope of escaping.

Now.

It was easier for him to obtain the primordial vine liquid in the vine grass nest, but the effect of the primordial vine liquid on him was reduced, and now it took a lot of primordial vine liquid to break the boundary once.

"It seems that after the primordial vine liquid helps me break the boundary ten times, its effect will be very weak. When the time comes, I'll have to find other treasures to help refine my body!"

But for now, he didn't need to worry about refining his body.

this day.

There was a big incident in the Hanhai District, and the high-level of the Xuanyu Pavilion sent information to all the members.

"Don't run around lately!"

Soon, all the members knew what had happened.

"A half-step eightfold ancestor is actually frantically devouring Dao Ancestor!!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

According to the information I heard, this Dao Ancestor practiced a kind of devouring Yuan Dao, and it stands to reason that this kind of Yuan Dao is very normal and nothing special.

But the key is that the Yuan Dao that this Dao Ancestor comprehended actually needs to devour a large number of Dao Ancestors, and even devour the Yuan Dao of the Sevenfold Dao Ancestor, so as to strengthen his own Yuan Dao.

After comprehending the Yuan Dao, it is not that there is no need to cultivate and improve, but that is something that only needs to be done after the Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

The Yuan Dao also has realm divisions, entry, small success, great success, consummation, and limit.

And that half-step eightfold primordial ancestor had to devour countless Dao ancestors in order to comprehend the Extreme Yuan Dao, so he could do it.

In the past, this half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor had only secretly devoured some Dao Ancestors, but now that he was about to break through, he urgently needed a large number of Dao Ancestors, so he was a little crazy and was finally discovered.

With this discovery, the other party had no scruples at all, and successively swallowed dozens of community boundaries, along with ordinary lives.

Now.

The half-step eightfold ancestor of the Hanhai District Realm was all chasing down this half-step eightfold ancestor.

The only thing that is fortunate is that this half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor comprehends the Eightfold Yuan Dao, if it is the Ninefold Yuan Dao, then it really needs the Eightfold Origin Ancestor to be able to deal with him.

"This half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor has actually devoured dozens of community realms, this has indeed provoked the anger of the public!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly.

If the other party is allowed to devour it like this, then it will be okay, and a large number of lives in the community boundary will have to be swallowed.

"I hope I won't run to the boundary of the Primeval Plains!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

However, the other party shouldn't be able to look down on that side, after all, there are not even a few half-step sevenfold ancestors over there, and there is not a single sevenfold ancestor.

For that half-step Eightfold Ancestor, there was no way to improve his Yuan Dao at all, and there was no point in going there.

As this incident happened, countless Dao Ancestors were so frightened that they didn't dare to go out, and they didn't even dare to stay in their own community realm, after all, the community realm was not safe.

Suddenly, the giant cities and top community realms on the silent black sea became the hope of these Dao Ancestors, and a large number of Dao Ancestors came to these giant cities and top community realms to wait.

There are those who are cowardly, and even pay the price to leave the boundary of the Hanhai region and go to other major boundaries.
